title: CBN Assures Public of Keystone Bank’s Stability - FinancialEDGE
description: Following the court order that the shares of Keystone Bank Limited previously held by the shareholders be forfeited to the Federal Government of Nigeria, the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) has reassure the public that Keystone Bank Limited remains safe, sound, and fully operational. According to a statement signed by Hakama Sidi Ali (Mrs.) Ag.
html:
Following the court order that the shares of Keystone Bank Limited previously held by the shareholders be forfeited to the Federal Government of Nigeria, the Central Bank

of Nigeria (CBN)  has reassure the public that Keystone Bank Limited remains safe, sound, and fully operational.
